legend.verified: MCP natural path and console verified
legend.partial: fixed or analyzed, runtime recheck pending
legend.blocked: blocked by data condition or intentional mutation guard
legend.documented: documented product page, not verified yet
legend.dev-only: DEV.md exists but no png.txt state was found
legend.missing-doc: route referenced by docs but no png.txt node was found
